heading: Relation to Safe Drinking Water Act
label: 17254 Relation to Safe Drinking Water Act
text: The injection and geologic sequestration of carbon dioxide pursuant to this subtitle and the amendments made by this subtitle shall be subject to the requirements of the Safe Drinking Water Act ( et seq.), including the provisions of part C of such Act ( et seq.; relating to protection of underground sources of drinking water). Nothing in this subtitle and the amendments made by this subtitle imposes or authorizes the promulgation of any requirement that is inconsistent or in conflict with the requirements of the Safe Drinking Water Act ( et seq.) or regulations thereunder.42 U.S.C. 300f42 U.S.C. 300h42 U.S.C. 300f
